note: Package inventory for the local-first application. Bundled-data rights and provenance are recorded in data/source-manifest.json.

packages.label: Reader texts
packages.description: Static Bible reader with retained text editions and bundled Strong's word-study data.

feature_packs.label: BSB text
feature_packs.description: Berean Study Bible verse text shards.
feature_packs.license_note: Public domain as of 2023-04-30 per Berean Bible free licensing.

feature_packs.label: KJV text
feature_packs.description: King James Version verse text shards.
feature_packs.license_note: Public domain in the United States.

feature_packs.label: WBT text
feature_packs.description: Webster Bible Translation verse text shards.
feature_packs.license_note: Public domain in the United States.

feature_packs.label: ASV text
feature_packs.description: American Standard Version verse text shards.
feature_packs.license_note: Public domain in the United States.

feature_packs.label: ERV text
feature_packs.description: English Revised Version verse text shards.
feature_packs.license_note: Public domain in the United States.

feature_packs.label: WEB text
feature_packs.description: World English Bible verse text shards.
feature_packs.license_note: Public domain per eBible.org / World English Bible copyright notice.

feature_packs.label: DBT text
feature_packs.description: Darby Bible Translation verse text shards.
feature_packs.license_note: Public domain in the United States.

feature_packs.label: DRB text
feature_packs.description: Douay-Rheims Bible verse text shards.
feature_packs.license_note: Public domain in the United States.

feature_packs.label: SLT text
feature_packs.description: Smith's Literal Translation verse text shards.
feature_packs.license_note: Public domain in the United States.

feature_packs.label: YLT text
feature_packs.description: Young's Literal Translation verse text shards.
feature_packs.license_note: Public domain in the United States.

feature_packs.label: Reader Strong's overlays
feature_packs.description: Token-level Strong's mappings loaded by the BSB, KJV, and YLT reader routes.
feature_packs.license_note: Bundled-data provenance is recorded in data/source-manifest.json.

feature_packs.label: Hebrew lexicon
feature_packs.description: Chunked Hebrew Strong's lexicon entries for word-study panels.
feature_packs.license_note: Bundled-data provenance is recorded in data/source-manifest.json.

feature_packs.label: Greek lexicon
feature_packs.description: Chunked Greek Strong's lexicon entries for word-study panels.
feature_packs.license_note: Bundled-data provenance is recorded in data/source-manifest.json.

feature_packs.label: Cross references
feature_packs.description: Book-level cross-reference datasets used in verse study tabs.
feature_packs.license_note: Bundled-data provenance is recorded in data/source-manifest.json.

feature_packs.label: Commentary verse index
feature_packs.description: Aggregated and source-backed commentary links keyed by verse.
feature_packs.license_note: Bundled-data provenance is recorded in data/source-manifest.json.

feature_packs.label: Book outlines
feature_packs.description: Structured section outlines for each book.
feature_packs.license_note: Bundled-data provenance is recorded in data/source-manifest.json.

feature_packs.label: Search indexes
feature_packs.description: Generated verse and study search shards and manifest.
feature_packs.license_note: Generated local index data retained for app functionality.

feature_packs.label: Hebrew interlinear
feature_packs.description: Token-level Hebrew interlinear dataset used by interlinear views.
feature_packs.license_note: Derived from bundled data; provenance is recorded in data/source-manifest.json.

feature_packs.label: Greek interlinear
feature_packs.description: Token-level Greek interlinear dataset used by interlinear views.
feature_packs.license_note: Derived from bundled data; provenance is recorded in data/source-manifest.json.

feature_packs.label: Word-map analysis
feature_packs.description: Canonical word-map spans generated from packaged Strong's overlays and verse text.
feature_packs.license_note: Generated from packaged datasets for reproducible local analysis workflows.

feature_packs.label: Graph analysis
feature_packs.description: Cross-reference graph summaries generated per book and globally.
feature_packs.license_note: Generated from packaged datasets for reproducible local analysis workflows.

feature_packs.label: BSB footnotes
feature_packs.description: Inline BSB footnote records loaded by reader routes.
feature_packs.license_note: Packaged runtime data; distribution rights require explicit review.

feature_packs.label: BSB presentation metadata
feature_packs.description: Headings, paragraph structure, poetry layout, and presentation metadata loaded by the reader.
feature_packs.license_note: Packaged runtime data; distribution rights require explicit review.

feature_packs.label: Hebrew and Greek language metadata
feature_packs.description: Alphabet and mark metadata used by original-language tooltips.
feature_packs.license_note: Application metadata packaged for original-language UI.

feature_packs.label: Semantic definitions and propositions
feature_packs.description: Packaged tag definitions, relations, and starter interpretation propositions.
feature_packs.license_note: Application semantic metadata.

feature_packs.label: Westminster Leningrad Codex (WLC)
feature_packs.description: Pointed Hebrew source-script verse corpus used by Original Language Study.
feature_packs.license_note: Extracted from the reviewed OpenBible archive; provenance and archive terms are recorded in data/source-manifest.json and NOTICE.md.

feature_packs.label: WLC — Consonants Only (WLCO)
feature_packs.description: Consonants-only Hebrew source-script verse corpus used by Original Language Study.
feature_packs.license_note: Extracted from the reviewed OpenBible archive; provenance and archive terms are recorded in data/source-manifest.json and NOTICE.md.

feature_packs.label: Nestle Greek New Testament 1904
feature_packs.description: Nestle 1904 Greek source-script verse corpus used by Original Language Study.
feature_packs.license_note: Extracted from the reviewed OpenBible archive; provenance and archive terms are recorded in data/source-manifest.json and NOTICE.md.

feature_packs.label: Scrivener Textus Receptus 1894 (TR94)
feature_packs.description: Scrivener 1894 Greek source-script verse corpus used by Original Language Study.
feature_packs.license_note: Extracted from the reviewed OpenBible archive; provenance and archive terms are recorded in data/source-manifest.json and NOTICE.md.
